questions.question: The functional megaspore in an angiosperm develops into:
questions.explanation: In angiosperms, the functional megaspore undergoes mitotic divisions to form the female gametophyte, also called the embryo sac.
questions.subject: Biology

questions.question: Transfer of pollen grains from anther to stigma of another flower of the same plant is:
questions.explanation: Geitonogamy is functionally cross-pollination involving a pollinating agent, but genetically it is similar to autogamy since pollen comes from the same plant.
questions.subject: Biology

questions.question: Filiform apparatus is a characteristic feature of:
questions.explanation: Synergids have special cellular thickenings at the micropylar tip called filiform apparatus, which guide the pollen tube into the synergid.
questions.subject: Biology
